offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, unflagged exceptions cause processing delays. We monitor claims and flag exceptions instead of manual review of claims.
problem: delays in processing claims due to unflagged exceptions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar tools
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try exception flagging and claim monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequent inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing claims data
